title: Indian Institute of Management Visakhapatnam | IIMV
meta_description: Indian Institute of Management Visakhapatnam (IIMV) is an Institution of National Importance under the IIM Act 2017, committed to excellence in management.
meta_keywords: Indian Institute of Management Visakhapatnam, IIM Visakhapatnam, IIMV, management institute India

The Institute Program Faculty & Research Skip to main content About IIMV Indian Institute of Management Visakhapatnam (IIM V), established under the IIM Act 2017, is one of India’s fastest-growing management institutions. Mentored by IIM Bangalore, the institute offers world-class academic standards, industry-aligned programs, and a strong focus on leadership, innovation, and ethics. Located in the dynamic coastal city of Visakhapatnam, IIMV provides a vibrant learning environment with modern digital classrooms, advanced labs, and a state-of-the-art permanent campus at Gambheeram. The institute’s programs—including the flagship MBA, Executive MBA, PGPEx, Ph.D., and weekend executive learning modules—combine academic rigor with real-world exposure, preparing students for an evolving global business landscape. Industry-Aligned Curriculum Diverse Academic Programs Emerging Innovation Hub More About Us Director's Message The Institute is constantly strengthening its academic standards; research performance; faculty capacities; and governance processes. IIMV Facts The institute consistently records excellent placements and hosts a growing network of successful alumni across sectors. 50 + Experienced Faculty – Leading Minds, Guiding Futures 500 + Programs Delivered – Excellence Across Disciplines 600 + Students Nurtured – Building Tomorrow’s Leaders 15453 + Learning Hours – Commitment You Can Count On Academic Programmes Doctoral Program (PhD) PhD Program of the Indian Institute of Management Visakhapatnam (IIMV) is a research-intensive doctoral program aimed at imparting high-quality training in research. Admission View More Executive PhD Program (Exec-PhD) The Executive PhD program of IIM Visakhapatnam is for the individuals with work experience, and it is designed to meet the requirements of the employer organization, Admission View More Post-Doctoral Fellowship Program (PDF) Indian Institute of Management Visakhapatnam (IIMV) is launching the Post- Doctoral Fellowship (PDF) Program from 2024. Admission View More Post Graduate Program (PGP) The two-year, full-time, residential Post Graduate Programme, leading up to Post Graduate Degree in Management, is designed to equip students to take on leadership roles in a rapidly changing global scenario. Admission View More Executive Master of Business Administration (EMBA) Executive Master of Business Administration (EMBA) is a master’s degree program designed with the objective of imparting management education to working executives seeking skills and strategies to make their organizations perform well. Admission View More Post-Graduate Program in Management for the Centrally Funded Technical Institutions, Institutions of National Importance (PGPMCI) Embark on a transformative journey with our pioneering B.Tech-MBA Program, a collaborative initiative designed to offer students from engineering and technology backgrounds a seamless pathway to management education. Admission View More Executive Post-Graduate Diploma Program in Management (EPGDPM) The one-year Executive Post-Graduate Diploma Program in Management (EPGDPM) program is speciﬁcally crafted for the oﬃcers and executives in the defence production sector. Admission View More Post Graduate Diploma in Management for Executives (PGDMEx) The Post Graduate Diploma in Management for Executives is a diploma program designed for working professionals seeking to accelerate their careers with strategic business acumen and cross-functional leadership skills without leaving current job. It’s not just a campus—it's an experience that shapes perspectives, careers, and lifelong friendships.
